title: Dew claw
content:
{{Top|leg}}
{{Otheruses|Claw}}
[[File:Yevetha_NEGAS.jpg|thumb|Yevetha with extended dew claws]]
The '''dew claw''' was a retractable, curved claw enclosed the underside of the [[Yevetha]]n wrist. These claws could extend to almost a [[Foot/Legends|foot]] in length for use in close combat and [[dominance killing]].

==Behind the scenes==
''[[Alien Anthology]]'' contradicts all other descriptions and images of dew claws, displaying them as a pair of blades protruding from either side of the wrist, as opposed to a single blade from below the wrist. See [[:File:Yev.jpg|this image]] for reference.

==Appearances==
*''[[Coruscant Nights I: Jedi Twilight]]''
*''[[Tyrant's Test]]'' {{1st}}
*[[Tyrant's Test (abridged audiobook)|''Tyrant's Test'' abridged audiobook]]
